productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Pink Shirt
description: Composition Pink and blue striped shirt made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Don a royal look and spread your grandeur in style with this striped shirt from the Deep Royals collection of peter england. Crafted in Royal Indian signature colours from a cotton blend fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
